title: [cross-impl] synchronized_hop_channel only implemented in Python SimNode
description: Commit 798f2fac5 added synchronized_hop_channel() to python/src/lichen/sim/node.py matching ccp16-hop.json and spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:120 using SFN % len(hop_schedule). No equivalent in Rust (lichen-node, lichen-core) or Zephyr C (lichen_tdma_compute_slot only does static slot, no dynamic hop_schedule). Leads to different behavior for CCP-12 channel selection across impls. Test vectors in test/vectors/ccp16-hop.json and ccp9.json require all three (Python/Rust/Zephyr) to match exactly. See also lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c:157 TDMA comments.
